title: Sequoia Pack
body:
Sequoia [SEQ] Approved Modpack made for Sequoia Members.
Only 'ESSENTIAL MODS' are enabled by default, feel free to enable/disable mods to your preference (full list below)

Essential Mods:
- Fabric API
- Modlist
- Cloth Config API
- Searchables
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Reeses Sodium Options
- Lithium
- C2ME
- Modernfix
- Wynntils
- Sequoia Mod

Recommended:
- Wynnmod (QOL)
- WynnExtras (QOL)
- Wynnventory (QOL) - BREAKS Trade Market ATM
- Dynamic Fps (FPS WHILE TABBED)
- Zoomify (ZOOOOOOM)
- Chat Patches (QOL)

Optional:
- Avomod (War QOL)
- Borderless Fullscreen (QOL)
- Commandkeys (Extra Keybinds)
- Chat Patches (QOL)
- Serverpack Priority (For Custom Resource Packs)
- Entityculling *
- Voxy (Lod Render Distance)
- Wynn Vista (addon for voxy)
- Inhibitor (QOL?)
- WynnIris (Shaders)
- Wynnlimbo (QOL)

*Entity Culling can often be a boon towards performance on lowerend PC's however will make running raids like NOL difficult.
